name: Camera Encoder
description: The `camera_encoder` component provides image compression support for software-based cameras or cameras without internal compression. It allows raw camera frames to be compressed into a format suitable for transmission to API clients, such as Home Assistant, which expect JPEG-compressed images.

config_entries.label: Buffer Expand Size
config_entries.description: Number of bytes to expand the output buffer if it is too small to hold the JPEG-encoded image. A value of `0` disables expansion.

config_entries.label: Buffer Size
config_entries.description: Initial size of the output buffer in bytes, used to store the JPEG-encoded image data.

config_entries.label: Quality
config_entries.description: Sets JPEG compression quality. Valid values range from `1` (lowest quality, highest compression) to `100` (best quality, least compression). Defaults: `80`.
